title: Drugs
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'drugs'?
Have you ever used illegal drugs?
Many people say marijuana is more dangerous than alcohol. What do you think?
Many people around the world use 'designer' drugs, such as ecstasy, or recreational drugs, such as cannabis. Do you think this is OK?
What punishment do you think drug barons should get?
Would you like to work as an anti-narcotics police officer?
When you're sick, do you use medicine?
What do you think of alternative medicine?
Do you support the use of clinical marijuana?
Is drug use a big problem in your country?
Was drug use a problem in your high school?
Is alcohol worse than many illegal drugs?
Should the legal drinking age be changed?
Should patents held by pharmaceutical companies be bypassed in order to help those in need (e.g. people suffering from HIV in Africa)?
